Registry / Terms / certified reference material (CRM)

certified reference material (CRM)

VIMOutdated — VIM 2007 G 18 #02153 · 4 instances

Authoritative definition

VIM 2007 · concept #5.14view ↗

*reference material*, accompanied by documentation issued by an authoritative body and providing one or more specified property values with associated uncertainties and traceabilities, using valid procedures

Outdated: Cites VIM 2007. Latest: VIM 2012.
  • VIM 2007 · #5.14
    *reference material*, accompanied by documentation issued by an authoritative body and providing one or more specified property values with associated uncertainties and traceabilities, using valid procedures

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH ✗ This term is NOT in VIM 2012.
  2. MEDIUM 4 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

4 distinct definitions across 4 publications.

4 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
202X2016OIML R146-1:20162.1.02784
{reference material, accompanied by documentation issued by an authoritative body and providing one or more specified property values with associated uncertainties and traceabilities, using valid procedures [VIM 5.14]}
pending
20102008OIML D 18:20082.202153
reference material, accompanied by documentation issued by an (VIM:2007, 5.14) authoritative body and providing one or more specified property values with associated uncertainties and traceabilities, using valid procedures
pending
202X2008OIML D 18:20082.202153
reference material, accompanied by documentation issued by an authoritative body and providing one or more specified property values with associated uncertainties and traceabilities, using valid procedures [VIM:2007, 5.14]
pending
20102008OIML R 142:20082.4(annex 6)02122
reference material, accompanied by documentation issued by an authoritative body and referring to valid procedures used to obtain a specified property value with uncertainty and traceability
pending
